{{Fig|Importing 47 pictures of [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gabrielle_Union Gabrielle Union] from the web to Photos [[Glossary:Concept_group|concept group]]. 5 of the pictures have already been imported to this [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] (DUPLICATE!!!). The pictures get imported as '''Page of images''' (i.e. into a single [[Glossary:Element|element]]). Note that when pictures are imported from the web in this mode they get automatically tiled.}}
